testcase.name: test

failure.message:
Locator expected to contain text Error: element(s) not found Expected: Your Account Has Been Created! Received: null
Call log: - Assert "containsText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText("Your Account Has Been Created!", new Page.GetByTextOptions().setExact(true))

testcase.failure:
org.opentest4j.AssertionFailedError: Locator expected to contain text Error: element(s) not found Expected: Your Account Has Been Created! Received: null
Call log: - Assert "containsText" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for getByText("Your Account Has Been Created!", new Page.GetByTextOptions().setExact(true)) at com.microsoft.playwright.impl.AssertionsBase.expectImpl(AssertionsBase.java:74) at com.microsoft.playwright.impl.AssertionsBase.expectImpl(AssertionsBase.java:47) at com.microsoft.playwright.impl.AssertionsBase.expectImpl(AssertionsBase.java:39) at com.microsoft.playwright.impl.LocatorAssertionsImpl.containsText(LocatorAssertionsImpl.java:75) at com.microsoft.playwright.assertions.LocatorAssertions.containsText(LocatorAssertions.java:1008) at page.LoginPage.registerAccount(LoginPage.java:74) at test.First.test(First.java:22) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) ... Removed 25 stack frames
